message:
feat(testing): implement skill test framework

Add comprehensive test framework for skill testing:
- TestDefinition/TestSpec: YAML-based test specifications
- Test phases: setup, steps, cleanup with tags and requirements
- Test steps: run, assert, load_skill, write_file, mkdir, etc.
- SkillTestRunner: Discovers and executes tests per skill
- StepExecutor: Manages test context and step execution

New error variants: Timeout, AssertionFailed for test execution.

Dependencies added:
- which: command existence checking
- humantime-serde: duration parsing
- semver: serde feature for version serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
